title: huge biomes
description: this makes all biomes huge, even larger than large biomes biomes
body:
# This datapack makes every biome so massive, you'll never find what you're looking for!
So basically it's ragebait. But it's also a fun challenge I guess. It's like single biome but also not. 
Also, if you were wondering, it is bigger than the big biomes modifier when creating a world. Much bigger.

# data:
biomes are so big /locate can't find anything. So there isn't any data on how big they are hehe.

# alternative start:
DO YOU LOVE EXPLORING? WELL LUCKY YOU THIS DATAPACK MAKES IT TAKE 9,99899E432X TIMES LONGER!!! HAHA. haha. ha
...ha

# Key Features:

- Expanded Biome Sizes: Will you find a mushroom fields, or DIE TRYING??? 🔥

- thats basically it
